pattern: Counting consecutive alternating triples on a circular array by checking neighbors with wrap-around indexing.
hints: A group of three consecutive tiles is alternating when the middle tile differs from both neighbors.
The array is circular, so index arithmetic uses modulo n to wrap around.
A single linear pass suffices: for each position i, check whether colors[i] differs from colors[(i-1) mod n] and from colors[(i+1) mod n].

edge_inputs.description: all same color — no alternating groups
single alternating position surrounded by matching tiles
wrap-around at ends forms an alternating group

stress.description: random binary circular arrays of length up to 100
